ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was submitted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., in development, deployed, archived) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., regression, classification, clustering) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "mean_fit_time" REAL /* Mean fitting time of the model */,
  "std_fit_time" REAL /* Standard deviation of fitting time */,
  "mean_test_score" REAL /* Mean test score of the model */,
  "std_test_score" REAL /* Standard deviation of test score */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "evaluation_status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with the hyperparameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the hyperparameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test score */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation associated with the score */,
  "split_number" INTEGER /* The split number for the model evaluation */,
  "test_score" REAL /* The score achieved in that specific split */,
  "split_description" TEXT /* Description of the split (e.g., train, validation, test) */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of the score (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scores_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "train_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training score */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation associated with the score */,
  "split_number" INTEGER /* The split number for the model evaluation */,
  "train_score" REAL /* The score achieved during training for that specific split */,
  "split_description" TEXT /* Description of the split (e.g., train, validation, test) */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of the score (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_train_scores_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action (e.g., view, submit, evaluate) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to perform the action (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "setting_category" TEXT /* Category of the setting (e.g., system, user, model) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
